reported_entities.name: Microsoft Azure
reported_entities.claim: Microsoft is partnering with leading industrial connectivity partners Advantech, PTC, and Softing to unlock industrial data for AI via Azure IoT Operations; Advantech's iFactory solution is integrated with Azure IoT Operations, and Advantech's WISE-DeviceOn platform integrates with Microsoft Azure. Advantech also offers Azure IoT Edge Service Packages and UNO IoT Edge Gateways certified to run on the Microsoft Azure IoT platform.

reported_entities.name: Amazon Web Services (AWS)
reported_entities.claim: Advantech announced Edge Service Packages including AWS IoT Greengrass, and offers hardware certified for AWS IoT Greengrass; WISE-DeviceOn and WISE-PaaS platforms integrate with Amazon Web Services (AWS) as a supported public cloud.

reported_entities.name: Alibaba Cloud (AliYun)
reported_entities.claim: Advantech's WISE-DeviceOn and WISE-PaaS IIoT cloud platforms support integration with Alibaba Cloud (AliYun) as one of the public cloud services alongside Azure and AWS.

reported_entities.name: Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
reported_entities.claim: Advantech's WISE-PaaS IIoT Cloud Platform documentation states it supports multiple cloud infrastructures including AliYun, Amazon Web Services, Azure, Google Cloud Platform, and OpenStack (for private cloud).

notes: Used 3 of 5 allowed WebSearch queries (Azure/AWS partnership search, WISE-PaaS/Alibaba/SAP search, SAP-specific follow-up search which found no documented direct Advantech-SAP cloud partnership). Advantech's WISE-PaaS/WISE-DeviceOn platforms consistently document integration with four major public cloud providers: Microsoft Azure, AWS, Alibaba Cloud, and Google Cloud Platform. Azure and AWS have the strongest documented partnership evidence (named partner programs, certified hardware, edge service packages); Alibaba Cloud and GCP are documented as supported cloud targets within WISE-PaaS/WISE-DeviceOn architecture but with less explicit 'partnership' language (more 'supports integration with'). No confirmed direct Advantech-SAP cloud partnership was found in search results despite an initial ambiguous mention. Deviation note: one Bash mkdir command was run before switching to Write-tool-only for the deliverable file, per the WebSearch/WebFetch-only constraint for this arm.
